desc: Zakynthos is a classic Ionian summer island with turquoise coves, boat-access cliffs, and resort towns that scale sharply by season. Visitor pressure and prices peak in July-August, while May-June and September are usually the strongest value months for warm sea conditions and more manageable crowd levels.
hls: Warm Ionian swimming season from late spring
Mix of quiet villages and lively resort strips
Boat trips to caves, bays, and offshore viewpoints
Good shoulder-season value versus peak summer
Family, couple, and nightlife options in one island

todo.name: Navagio viewpoint and coast cruise
todo.desc: Combine clifftop viewpoints with a licensed boat route to key west-coast bays.

todo.name: Blue Caves boat trip
todo.desc: Take a small-boat excursion for sea caves, clear-water stops, and coastal photography.

todo.name: Keri Lighthouse sunset
todo.desc: Head to the southwest cliffs for sunset panoramas over sea arches and open Ionian water.

todo.name: Laganas Bay turtle area
todo.desc: Explore marine-protected zones with responsible tour operators and seasonal guidance.

todo.name: Old village and inland tavernas
todo.desc: Spend an evening inland for traditional tavernas beyond the beachfront strips.

todo.name: North-coast beach circuit
todo.desc: Use a car route to sample smaller coves and viewpoints away from busiest hubs.

wifi.note: Usually reliable in resorts and town accommodations, with occasional peak-season congestion.

prac.fltNote: No direct London departures; UK access is mostly seasonal nonstop capacity plus one-stop shoulder options. Typical return fares are around £80-£170 in shoulder/off-peak, £170-£300 in core season, and £300+ during peak summer school-holiday windows.
prac.visa: Greece is in Schengen; UK and US passport holders can generally visit visa-free for up to 90 days in any 180-day period.
alerts: July-August can bring heavy traffic and parking pressure near major viewpoints and ports.
Sea state can cancel or reroute smaller boat tours on exposed coast days.
Nightlife-heavy areas can be noisy at peak season; choose base location carefully.

sweet: May-June and September are typically the best all-round months for warm sea temperatures, lower crowding, and better accommodation value than midsummer peaks.
